## What should change?

Describe the product or engineering improvement.

## Why does it matter?

Explain what user problem this solves.

## Where does it fit?

- [ ] Check flow
- [ ] Investigation report
- [ ] RiskWiseAI Coach
- [ ] Profile and memory
- [ ] Backend/data
- [ ] Documentation

## Notes

Add screenshots, examples, or edge cases if useful.
